annotations.note: Mathlib has a general `Polygon P n` structure (with `n = 6` as the hexagon special case), but no dedicated hexagon definition.

annotations.label: Sum of interior angles of a hexagon

anchor.snippet: The total of the internal angles of any simple

annotations.note: No general interior-angle-sum theorem for n-gons or hexagons was found in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Regular hexagon

anchor.snippet: A regular hexagon is defined as a hexagon that is both equilateral and equiangular

annotations.note: Mathlib has no `RegularPolygon` or regular hexagon definition.

annotations.label: Regular hexagon is bicentric

anchor.snippet: A regular hexagon is bicentric

annotations.note: No bicentric polygon theory and no regular-hexagon-specific statement found.

annotations.label: Long diagonals equal twice the side; partition into equilateral triangles

anchor.snippet: The longest diagonals of a regular hexagon, connecting diametrically opposite vertices, are twice the length of one side

annotations.note: No statement about diagonals of a regular hexagon was found in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Relation of maximal and minimal diameters

anchor.snippet: The maximal diameter (which corresponds to the long diagonal of the hexagon)

annotations.note: No hexagon diameter relations were found.

annotations.label: Area of a regular hexagon

anchor.snippet: The area of a regular hexagon

annotations.note: No area formula for a regular hexagon (3√3/2 · t²) is present in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Area via apothem and perimeter

anchor.snippet: For any regular polygon , the area can also be expressed in terms of the apothem

annotations.note: No `apothem` declaration or area-from-apothem theorem found in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Symmetry group of the regular hexagon

anchor.snippet: A regular hexagon has six rotational symmetries

annotations.note: Mathlib defines the general `DihedralGroup n` but does not connect `DihedralGroup 6` to a regular hexagon.

annotations.label: Nine distinct symmetries (Conway labels)

anchor.snippet: These symmetries express nine distinct symmetries of a regular hexagon

annotations.note: Conway's symmetry-label classification of hexagonal symmetries is not formalized.

annotations.label: Parallelogon hexagons tessellate the plane

anchor.snippet: as parallelogons can tessellate the Euclidean plane by translation

annotations.note: Parallelogons and plane tessellation theory are not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: A2 root system as regular hexagon

anchor.snippet: The 6 roots of the simple Lie group A2

annotations.note: Mathlib has root pairing infrastructure but no specific A2-as-regular-hexagon statement.

annotations.label: G2 root system as hexagonal pattern

anchor.snippet: The 12 roots of the Exceptional Lie group G2

annotations.note: Mathlib formalizes the G2 root pairing and proves it has twelve roots, but does not state its hexagonal geometric arrangement.

annotations.label: Regular hexagons tile the plane

anchor.snippet: regular hexagons fit together without any gaps to tile the plane

annotations.note: No tilings/tessellations of the Euclidean plane are formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.note: No zonogon definition or dissection theorem found in Mathlib.

annotations.note: Polytope truncation operations are not in Mathlib.

anchor.snippet: any irregular hexagon which satisfies the Conway criterion will tile the plane

annotations.note: Conway's tiling criterion is not formalized in Mathlib.
